heading: Class A notes as paid-in capital of the Bank
label: 3017a Class A notes as paid-in capital of the Bank
text: Only for purposes of , class A notes shall be deemed to be paid-in capital of the Bank.section 3017(a) of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the National Consumer Cooperative Bank Act Amendments of 1981 and also as part of the Omnibus Budget Reconciliation Act of 1981, and not as part of the National Consumer Cooperative Bank Act which comprises this chapter.

Effective Date, , , provided that: For definition of “Final Government Equity Redemption Date”, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 97–35, title III, § 391(b)(2)95 Stat. 434section 396(a) of Pub. L. 97–35section 3012 of this titleAug. 13, 1981“This subsection [enacting this section] shall take effect on the day after the Final Government Equity Redemption Date [].”Dec. 31, 1981
